Class JModality.JavaModalityKind

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.Modality.Kind
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JModality.JavaModalityKind
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
ModalOperatorSV
Enclosing class:
JModality
public static class JModality.JavaModalityKind extends Modality.Kind

  • Field Details

    • DIA

      public static final JModality.JavaModalityKind DIA
      The diamond operator of dynamic logic. A formula <alpha;>Phi can be read as after processing the program alpha there exists a state such that Phi holds.

    • BOX

      public static final JModality.JavaModalityKind BOX
      The box operator of dynamic logic. A formula [alpha;]Phi can be read as 'In all states reachable processing the program alpha the formula Phi holds'.

    • DIA_TRANSACTION

      public static final JModality.JavaModalityKind DIA_TRANSACTION
      A Java Card transaction version of the diamond modality. Means that a transaction is currently underway.

    • BOX_TRANSACTION

      public static final JModality.JavaModalityKind BOX_TRANSACTION
      A Java Card transaction version of the box modality. Means that a transaction is currently underway.

    • TOUT

      public static final JModality.JavaModalityKind TOUT
      The throughout operator of dynamic logic. A formula [[alpha;]]Phi can be read as during processing the program alpha Phi should hold at every step of execution.

    • TOUT_TRANSACTION

      public static final JModality.JavaModalityKind TOUT_TRANSACTION
      A Java Card transaction version of the throughout modality. Means that a transaction is currently underway.

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaModalityKind

      public JavaModalityKind(Name name)

  • Method Details

    • getKind

      public static JModality.JavaModalityKind getKind(String name)

    • terminationSensitive

      public boolean terminationSensitive()
      Whether this modality is termination sensitive, i.e., it is a "diamond-kind" modality.

    • transaction

      public boolean transaction()
      Whether this is a transaction modality
